MonoBehaviour id=5754956525560203020 in the scene meta corresponds to XRLever (guid e601cf28e9702c945abe3b90e7f51974) on GameObject 'Lever'. It is configured with handle=7509008427246001996, defaultValue=true, and has a Collider (fileID 5238779549397348332), so Trigger is valid. OnLeverActivate has persistent calls: SetOriginalLayer() on component fileID 7541936460893253790 and PlaySoundsFromList.PlayAtIndex(0) on component fileID 1145393436748058495. OnLeverDeactivate has no persistent calls. To cover both UnityEvents, first simulate a select-and-release with the interactor positioned to the lever's 'off' side (local z <= 0) before release to invoke ApplyValue(false) which fires OnLeverDeactivate.

Repeat a select-and-release with the interactor positioned to the lever's 'on' side (local z > 0) before release to invoke ApplyValue(true), firing OnLeverActivate which triggers the configured UnityEvent calls (SetOriginalLayer() and PlaySoundsFromList.PlayAtIndex(0)).
